name: Baked Sole with Lemon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a large shallow baking dish.
3. Arrange fillets in the dish.
4. Sprinkle fillets with salt and pepper.
5. Dot with 2 tablespoons butter.
6. Bake for 10 minutes or until fish flakes easily when tested with a fork.
7. Start sauce preparation about 15 minutes before you put the fish in the oven.
8. In a cup, mix egg yolks with water; set aside.
9. In a heavy saucepan over medium heat, into 1 tablespoon hot butter, stir flour until well blended.
10. Gradually stir in chicken broth and lemon juice.
11. Cook with stirring until mixture is thickened.
12. Remove saucepan from heat.
13. Into egg yolks, add 6-8 drops of Tabasco Sauce.
14. Slowly pour egg mixture into sauce, stirring rapidly to avoid lumping.
15. Cook with stirring until thickened (Do not boil).
16. Spoon off any excess liquid from fish.
17. Pour sauce over fish and garnish with sliced stuffed green olive.
